column2: expected_skus(pipe-separated, ANY one must appear in top N)

column1: # curated 2026-06-13 against store 13 (EN) with hybrid search live (Gemini embeddings).
# A row PASSES if at least one expected SKU appears in the top N hybrid results.
# Anchors are deliberately semantic (a telescope for "loves space", Beirut Blues for
# "civil war", dinosaur kits for the French query) so a regression in semantic recall
# is caught even when keyword search would still return generic matches.
gift for a 7 year old who loves space
# --- zero-result killers (paraphrase / no shared tokens with titles) ---
cadeau pour enfant qui aime les dinosaures
# --- exact / keyword regression guards (MUST keep passing in keyword-only mode too) ---
